case_title: SMITH, DELIA LUCILLE VS JOHN MCGARY REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN MCGARY REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28346, RECORD TRANSFERRED
CERT MAIL TO RUTH THOMPSON RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, DELIA LUCILLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHN MCGARY REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28346 ON 05/04/07. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, DELIA LUCILLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN MCGARY REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES THOMPSON, RUTH $1,478.93 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,478.93, DEFENDANT RUTH THOMPSON DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE- NO SERVICE.
